text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way back from an outing with Meisho
Doto when she asks to stop by the sporting goods
store.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for dragging you along... My shoes never
seem to last very long...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I must be falling over too much—that must be it.
I've tried to be more cautious, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Doto? So, you're looking to buy some new
shoes too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over and meet the intimidating gaze of a
punkish Umamusume. If I'm not mistaken, this is
Doto's roommate, Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... are you planning on buying something,
Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm heading out. This place's supposed to be
where all the sneakerheads go, but a shop that
doesn't show product specs isn't worth my time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: See ya, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is yet to take her eyes off Air
Shakur, even as she walks off.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing, except... she couldn't pick out...
any shoes.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was just wondering... maybe I can change that?
I've been such a nuisance to her up till now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so forgetful... and Shakur knows that, so she
makes the effort to check in on me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to give her my thanks, but... I always figure
she'll just find it annoying.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Although... maybe I can help her find what she's
looking for.
choice_data_list: Should we go catch her before she leaves?
Should we go catch her before she leaves?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Let's hurry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Shakur, w-wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto? Look where you're going, or else you'll fall.
You want something?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I just, um, would like to help you with
your shopping...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I go through my shoes very quickly... so I've tried
on quite a few in my time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've even made notes on all the shoes I've owned
and how I ruined them. Maybe you could make
some use of it... or maybe not.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whoa... So you've kept records of how durable your shoes were. Can't say I'm not interested.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What're you trying to get out of me, though? Info
like this doesn't come for free.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, I didn't mean anything like that... I just want
to repay you, since you're always... looking... out
for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Since when? I don't watch anyone's back but my
own, so if you wanna strike a deal, make it quick.
C'mon.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
M-make it quick? But, I... Wh-what should I do,
Trainer?
choice_data_list:
In exchange, Air Shakur should join us for
training.

Air Shakur should give us her recommendation,
too!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Your trainer's pretty sharp. I don't usually
let people see my training. Y'know, data privacy
and all that.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, th-that makes sense. T-training with someone
like me would only cause you trouble... I'm s-so
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's cool. I don't mind... if you let me have a
thorough look at that data of yours when we're
back at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can do that, no problem! But... is that really
okay for you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I later learn that their data analysis lasted well
into the night, and Meisho Doto was elated to
have been considered useful.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If that's your idea of making things even... Try the
brand over by the entrance. Either the red or
purple ones.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All the specs are written out on their website. The
red ones are made to last. The purple ones have
good grip, so they'll help you trip less.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Considering your running style and flexible knees,
I'd say those two are your best bet.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wooow... Thank you very much! I'll, um, buy
them both!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Both? Has anyone ever told you you put way too
much faith in others? Whatever. Send me the data
you've recorded after trying them out.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Okay, got it! I'll buy them now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is more than excited to head back
inside. She must be really happy Air Shakur gave
her some advice.
